hooks.name: format-on-save
hooks.description: Auto-format TypeScript, TSX, and JSON files on save

hooks.name: prevent-generated-file-edits
hooks.description: Block edits to auto-generated Power Apps SDK files

actions.command: echo '${filePath}' | grep -E '(power\.config\.json|src/services/.*\.ts|src/models/.*\.ts)$' && echo 'BLOCKED: This is a generated file. Use pac code delete-data-source and pac code add-data-source to regenerate.' && exit 1 || exit 0
actions.when: filePath matches 'power\.config\.json' || filePath matches 'src/services/.*\.ts' || filePath matches 'src/models/.*\.ts'
